P = 2^318-2^160-1

A |h|h’| curve embedding order | twist embedding order
9319 | 8 | 8 | (r-1)/12 | s-1
34038 | 16 | 16 | r-1 | (s-1)/9
59233 | 4 | 4 | r-1 | (s-1)/3
156201 | 4 | 4 | (r-1)/3 | (s-1)/25
167272 | 16 | 16 | (r-1)/3 | s-1
190327 | 4 | 4 | r-1 | s-1
